name: La Sierra de La Safra — Circular desde Novelda por La Mola y el sendero La Romana
region_intro: Mountain biking around Novelda offers diverse landscapes within the Vinalopó River valley, characterized by varied terrain suitable for outdoor enthusiasts. The region features the Sierra del Cid mountain range and the Clots de la Sal i Serra de la Mola Municipal Natural Park, providing a network of trails. These routes traverse rugged hills, valleys, and natural areas, with the town's location contributing to scenic beauty. Best mountain bike trails around Novelda The most popular mountain bike trail is La Sierra de La Safra — Circular desde Novelda por La Mola y el sendero La Romana, a 23.4 miles (37.6 km) trail that takes 3 hours 29 minutes to complete. This moderate route traverses varied terrain and passes by La Mola. Another top favourite among local mountain bikers is Abandoned Cave Dwelling – View of Paratge del Peratgó loop from Novelda, a moderate 24.3 miles (39.1 km) path. This route offers views of the Paratge del Peratgó. Local mountain bikers also love the Casa Upanel – Five-Arch Bridge loop from Novelda-Aspe, a 25.7 miles (41.4 km) trail leading through the local countryside, often completed in about 3 hours 21 minutes. Mountain biking around Novelda is defined by the Vinalopó River valley, the Sierra del Cid, and natural parks. The network offers options for various ability levels, from easy paths to more challenging, technical trails. The routes in Novelda are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.1 stars from more than 30 reviews. More than 900 mountain bikers have used komoot to explore Novelda's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many mountain bike trails are there around Novelda?
A: There are over 90 mountain bike trails available around Novelda, offering a wide range of options for different skill levels and preferences. The komoot community has explored these routes over 900 times.

Q: Are there easy mountain bike trails suitable for beginners in Novelda?
A: Yes, Novelda offers several easy mountain bike trails perfect for beginners. You can find 13 routes categorized as easy, such as the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/27634522" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Trail along the Vinalopó River – River crossing loop from Novelda-Aspe&lt;/a&gt;, which is 15.2 miles (24.5 km) long and takes about 2 hours to complete.

Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on mountain bike trails in Novelda?
A: The mountain bike trails in Novelda traverse diverse landscapes within the Vinalopó River valley. You can expect rugged hills, valleys, and natural areas, including parts of the Sierra del Cid mountain range and the Clots de la Sal i Serra de la Mola Municipal Natural Park. The terrain varies from easy paths along the river to more challenging, technical sections in the mountains.

Q: Are there any circular mountain bike routes in Novelda?
A: Yes, many mountain bike routes in Novelda are circular, allowing you to start and end at the same point. An example is &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e927529711/la-sierra-de-la-safra-circular-desde-novelda-por-la-mola-y-el-sendero-la-romana" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;La Sierra de La Safra — Circular desde Novelda por La Mola y el sendero La Romana&lt;/a&gt;, a 23.4 miles (37.6 km) moderate trail that passes by La Mola.

Q: What are some scenic viewpoints or landmarks I can see along the trails?
A: Many trails offer scenic views and pass by notable landmarks. For instance, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e927529711/la-sierra-de-la-safra-circular-desde-novelda-por-la-mola-y-el-sendero-la-romana" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;La Sierra de La Safra&lt;/a&gt; route passes by La Mola, where you can see the historic La Mola Castle and the María Magdalena Sanctuary, both offering incredible panoramic views. Another route, &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/27635074" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Abandoned Cave Dwelling – View of Paratge del Peratgó loop from Novelda&lt;/a&gt;, provides views of the Paratge del Peratgó.

Q: Are there any waterfalls or natural water features along the mountain bike routes?
A: Yes, the region features natural water elements. You might encounter highlights like the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/2440117" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Elche Reservoir and Waterfall&lt;/a&gt; or the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3363662" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Waterfall in the Barranco de la Encantada&lt;/a&gt;. The Vinalopó River itself is a prominent feature, with trails like the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/27634522" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Trail along the Vinalopó River – River crossing loop from Novelda-Aspe&lt;/a&gt; following its course.

Q: What do other mountain bikers say about the trails in Novelda?
A: The mountain bike trails in Novelda are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.1 stars from over 30 reviews. Mountain bikers often praise the varied terrain and the scenic beauty of the Vinalopó River valley and surrounding natural parks.

Q: Are there challenging mountain bike trails for experienced riders?
A: Absolutely. While there are easy and moderate options, Novelda also offers 17 difficult mountain bike trails for experienced riders seeking a challenge. These routes often involve more technical sections and significant elevation changes within the rugged hills of the Sierra del Cid.

Q: What is the typical length and duration of mountain bike routes in Novelda?
A: The routes vary significantly in length and duration. For example, easy trails like the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/27634522" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Trail along the Vinalopó River – River crossing loop from Novelda-Aspe&lt;/a&gt; are around 15 miles (24.5 km) and take about 2 hours. Moderate routes, such as &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/27635616" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Casa Upanel – Five-Arch Bridge loop from Novelda-Aspe&lt;/a&gt;, can be around 25.7 miles (41.4 km) and take approximately 3 hours 21 minutes. Difficult trails will naturally be longer and require more time.

Q: Are there any specific natural parks or protected areas to explore by mountain bike?
A: Yes, the region includes the Clots de la Sal i Serra de la Mola Municipal Natural Park, which offers trails that immerse visitors in the area's unique ecology. The Sierra del Cid mountain range also provides extensive terrain for mountain biking within a natural setting.

Q: What is the best time of year for mountain biking in Novelda?
A: Novelda benefits from warm weather and clean air, making it suitable for mountain biking for much of the year. Spring and autumn are generally ideal, offering pleasant temperatures for longer rides. Even winter can be enjoyable, though summer might be very hot, especially during midday.

Q: Can I find trails that pass by interesting bridges or historical structures?
A: Yes, some routes incorporate historical elements. For instance, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/27635616" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Casa Upanel – Five-Arch Bridge loop from Novelda-Aspe&lt;/a&gt; passes by the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/2675870" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Five-Arch Bridge&lt;/a&gt;, a notable structure in the local countryside.
tips: Nice views from the top at 843 masl! The way to get there is also very cool, with several alternatives between good tracks and entertaining paths.
